domains.name: Data Classification
domains.description: Policies, procedures, and controls for classifying data based on sensitivity, value, and regulatory requirements. Includes labeling, handling procedures, and metadata tagging.

domains.name: Encryption at Rest
domains.description: Controls for protecting stored data through encryption including full-disk encryption, database transparent data encryption (TDE), file-level encryption, and key escrow mechanisms.

domains.name: Encryption in Transit
domains.description: Controls for protecting data during transmission including TLS configuration, certificate management, VPN tunnels, API encryption, and email encryption standards.

domains.name: Encryption in Use
domains.description: Emerging controls for protecting data during processing including confidential computing, secure enclaves, homomorphic encryption, and in-memory encryption.

domains.name: Data Loss Prevention
domains.description: Controls for detecting and preventing unauthorized data exfiltration across network, endpoint, cloud, and email channels. Includes policy tuning and incident response.

domains.name: Key Management
domains.description: Controls for the complete cryptographic key lifecycle including generation, distribution, storage, rotation, destruction, HSM management, and BYOK/HYOK models.

domains.name: Backup & Recovery
domains.description: Controls for data backup encryption, immutable backup storage, air-gapped copies, recovery testing, and ransomware resilience strategies.

domains.name: Database Security
domains.description: Controls for database activity monitoring, access controls, privilege management, virtual patching, and database-specific encryption and masking.

domains.name: Data Masking & Tokenization
domains.description: Controls for static and dynamic data masking, format-preserving tokenization, test data management, and de-identification techniques.

domains.name: Secure Disposal
domains.description: Controls for secure media sanitization, crypto-shredding, certificate of destruction, cloud data deletion verification, and end-of-life data management.
